title: Rei Itasha Car
wikitext:
[]: Rei Itasha Car             Quote Post by Mt Olympus » Thu Dec 08, 2011 5:01 am Hi... long time lurker... found this figured y'all might enjoy. Also this is a pretty cool bi-weekly show if anyone is interested in other j-pop culture stuff. To skip to the Rei car go to 4:20 http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1vDs3E3etFg&feature=channel_video_title (sorry don't know how to embed this video to the post)

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Thu Dec 08, 2011 5:33 am This is good stuff. Thanks for introducing Otaku Verse Zero to us. I did not know Yuu Asakawa speaks English.... Even more than the Rei itasha (which is an example of quantity takes first priority) I am most impressed with the cosplay and the "Mito Koumon" moment when Asakawa finally let out who she really is... And there are so many Vocaloid itasha/itansha/itachari (particularly Miku). And all those ita-xxx of Macross Frontier, 11 eyes, Ikki Tousen, Monster Hunter, K-On, Lucky Star all look cool.... there is even a Gunbuster itasha with Gunbuster dakimakura on driving seat !!

[]:             Quote Post by Mt Olympus » Thu Dec 08, 2011 6:00 am No problem, I just started watching that show a few hours ago and found it via random internet surfing. Great show and great hosts! Yuu is adorable :) Rei's car reminds me more of an american-esque type of junkbox full of someones obsession rather than one of those show cars which is hilarious and for some reason seems appropriate(since I want it and all that is within). Thanks for the reply! :) Also, I have to agree with one of the youtube comments from that episode when Yuu told the cosplayers who she was I imagined their reaction would be much more energetic than that. Maybe they were tame because they were on the clock

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Thu Dec 08, 2011 12:37 pm The car is Tang-fuelled, I suppose.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Dec 08, 2011 12:54 pm Relevant: http://www.evamonkey.com/mari-makinami-illustrious-itasha/
